books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A classic American novel set in the Jazz Age, exploring themes of wealth, love, and the American Dream.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence in the American South.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian social science fiction novel about totalitarian control and surveillance.

books.title: Pride and Prejudice
books.author: Jane Austen
books.description: A romantic novel that critiques the British landed gentry at the end of the 18th century.

books.title: The Catcher in the Rye
books.author: J.D. Salinger
books.description: A controversial novel about teenage rebellion and alienation in post-war America.

books.title: Lord of the Flies
books.author: William Golding
books.description: A novel about a group of British boys stranded on an uninhabited island and their disastrous attempt to govern themselves.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: A fantasy adventure about Bilbo Baggins and his unexpected journey.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: A science fiction epic set on the desert planet Arrakis.
